task:
we are using 2 different agent harnesses (codex & claude code) and both of them are using different folders to store their skills.\
claude code is using .claude/skills/ and codex is using .agents/skills\
I want you to symlink both folders, so they are always shared. symlink the skills folder, not the idnividual skills. Is it possible to make this symlink 2 way, so it does not matter in which folder we are editing and creating new skills, so they are always shared?
so when creating a skill in .claude it will appear in .agents and vice versa?
